column1: 彼女は歌が上手なだけでなく、ダンスも一流だ。
column2: かのじょはうたがじょうずなだけでなく、だんすもいちりゅうだ。
column3: She's not only a great singer; she's also a top-class dancer.
column4: だけでなく～も (not only A, but also B)
column5: Noun/Verb[plain] + だけでなく + Noun/Clause + も
column6: expanding scope beyond a single item: 'not limited to A; B also applies'; highlights that more than one element is true
column8: だけでなく～も = not only A but also B; ばかりでなく = same (slightly more formal); に加えて = in addition to (additive, no negation of 'only')
